title: 真っ直ぐ届け、この気持ち！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in town one day when I see Narita Taishin
holding something that looks like a present.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Creek... I-I... I got this for—no, that doesn't get
any of my feelings across!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the sincerity training her friends put her
through the other day has paid off? It looks like
she's ready to hand over her gift.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it also looks like she's having a lot of trouble
taking that final step...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Crap, she's here...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait, Taishin! ♪ Thanks for inviting
me out today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So where are we going?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Um... well, we're not really going anywhere... I... I
actually have a present I need to give—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I see! You need my help picking out a present
for a friend?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Shoot, now what do I do? I can't figure out when
to give her the present!)

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Don't miss out on today's sales! Why not thank
the important people in your life with a little
gift? ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Urk... Yeah, I've gotta do this. Better spit it out
soon...)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, are you okay? I bet there's a lot on your
mind! Why don't we take a break? ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! That was scrumptious! What a wonderful
meal! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Dammit, I just can't do it... Why is this so hard?!
I'm such a dummy!)

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
Here, honey! I got you a present! I tried really
hard to choose something perfect for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I chose my gift for Creek carefully too. I wanted
to choose something that would make her really
happy...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(C'mon, get yourself together, Taishin! You told
yourself you were gonna give her the gift today!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Okay. I'm gonna do it. I've gotta—)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The person you want to get a present for must
mean the world to you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I can tell just from that look on your face. We have known each other for a long time, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Ugh, come on! It's now or never. Just be sincere!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. She really is important to me. So...
here! This is for you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I invited you out today to give you this, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I-I actually bought this apron ages ago.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I.. I wanted to give it to you earlier, but I couldn't
bring myself to do it, and time kept on passing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But I made up my mind! I told myself I'd be
sincere with you, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Thanks for everything, Creek. Really.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you went to all that trouble for my
sake! I'm just—I'm so...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Biiig hug time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine. But not too long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching from afar, I see Narita Taishin has
finally given Super Creek her present. Then, the
next day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well... You helped me during my training,
and I don't like owing people favors.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! Don't treat me like some kid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From a distance, I see Narita Taishin shoving her
way through a crowd of people as she makes a
beeline for me.
choice_data_list: Did you hand over your gift?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, shut up! Now's not the time for your stupid
questions!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It's just a little thank-you in return, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I said I don't want anything! It's the thought that
counts or whatever!
